name: RH
summary: PARTI Overview RH (collectively, we, us, or the Company) is a leading retailer and luxury lifestyle brand operating primarily in the home furnishings market. Our curated and fully integrated assortments are presented consistently across our sales channels, including our retail locations, websites and Sourcebooks.
